attacking_style: Capable of establishing and holding significant solo advantages in Monument-level races, demonstrated by sustaining 45-second gap post-breakaway on cobbled terrain before mechanical issues intervened.
team_tactics: Operates with minimal team support in critical Monument phases, leading to front group isolation that creates both opportunity for solo efforts and vulnerability to mechanical failures.
terrain_preference: Paris-Roubaix cobbled sectors suit his power and positioning skills; capable of handling harsh Monument terrain independently when in form.
vulnerability: Critically exposed when isolated without teammates in lead groups—mechanical issues become race-ending without support, as demonstrated when puncture eliminated 45-second advantage.
key_patterns: Races aggressively in Monuments despite teammate isolation, accepting high risk-reward scenarios.
Capable of holding significant time gaps solo in brutal conditions before mechanical failures.
Lacks team support infrastructure in critical race phases, amplifying impact of bad luck.
form_trajectory: unknown: single 2021 Monument observation shows strong potential undermined by crash; insufficient data for trajectory assessment
